content:
RE: https://mastodon.scot/@LaChasseuse/116692474272148212

This is probably true, though the truth is much more complicated, societies have made themselves dependent on oil, so the infrastructure is still there, switching to renewable energy (whilst I wholeheartedly agree is the correct choice) takes time, and significant investment.

True, but paints "if we just switched" as an easy option.

It is our only option.
